jobs.title: Backend Software Engineer
jobs.description: We are looking for a Backend Software Engineer to design and build scalable server-side systems. You will work on high-throughput APIs, database architecture, and microservices. You will collaborate closely with frontend and infrastructure teams to deliver reliable, performant backend services.
requirements: 3+ years of backend development experience
Proficiency in Python, Go, or Java
Experience designing and consuming REST or GraphQL APIs
Strong knowledge of SQL and NoSQL databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
Familiarity with microservices architecture and message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ)
Understanding of caching strategies (Redis, Memcached)
nice_to_have: Knowledge of distributed systems and CAP theorem

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: We are seeking a Frontend Engineer to build beautiful, responsive, and performant user interfaces. You will own the user experience layer of our product, work closely with designers, and integrate with backend APIs. A strong eye for detail and a passion for accessibility are key.
requirements: 3+ years of frontend development experience
Proficiency in React or Vue.js
Strong understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript (ES6+)
Experience with state management (Redux, Zustand, or Pinia)
Familiarity with design systems and component libraries
Knowledge of web performance optimisation techniques

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.description: Join our AI/ML team to build and deploy machine learning models that power Nexus Systems' core product features. You will be responsible for the full ML lifecycle — from data exploration and feature engineering to model training, evaluation, and production deployment.
requirements: 3+ years of hands-on ML engineering experience
Proficiency in Python and ML libraries (scikit-learn, PyTorch, or TensorFlow)
Experience with feature engineering and working with large datasets
Knowledge of model evaluation, A/B testing, and monitoring in production
Familiarity with MLOps tools and practices (MLflow, Weights & Biases, or similar)
Experience with cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, or Azure ML)

jobs.title: DevOps / Platform Engineer
jobs.description: We are hiring a DevOps / Platform Engineer to build and maintain the infrastructure that powers Nexus Systems. You will design CI/CD pipelines, manage cloud infrastructure, implement observability solutions, and ensure our platform is secure, scalable, and reliable.
requirements: 3+ years of DevOps or platform engineering experience
Strong experience with cloud providers (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
Proficiency with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Pulumi, or CDK)
Experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, CircleCI)
Knowledge of containerisation and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes)
Experience with monitoring and observability tools (Datadog, Prometheus, Grafana)
nice_to_have: Experience with cost optimisation on cloud infrastructure

jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
jobs.description: We are looking for a Full Stack Engineer who is comfortable working across the entire product — from database schema to pixel-perfect UI. You will take ownership of features end to end, collaborating with product, design, and infrastructure teams to ship high-quality software quickly.
requirements: 3+ years of full stack development experience
Proficiency in a modern frontend framework (React, Next.js, or Vue)
Strong backend skills in Node.js, Python, or similar
Experience with relational databases and writing efficient queries
Ability to work across the stack independently without close supervision
Familiarity with cloud deployment (AWS, GCP, or Heroku)
nice_to_have: Understanding of system design and scalability principles
